title: Dekton 50mm Closed Shackle Steel Padlock - weather Resistant | High Security Rating of 5 | Steel Laminated | Supplied With 3 Keys | Durable & Rust-resistant | Versatile Locking Solution
features: Weather Resistant for All Conditions: The Dekton 50mm Padlock is specifically designed to withstand various weather conditions. Its weather-resistant properties ensure reliable performance and protection against rain, snow, and extreme temperatures, making it ideal for both indoor and outdoor use.

High Security Rating of 5: With a high-security rating of 5, this padlock offers superior protection for your valuables. The robust design and advanced locking mechanism provide enhanced security, making it a reliable choice for safeguarding your property against unauthorized access.

Steel Laminated Construction: Crafted from steel laminated materials, the padlock boasts exceptional strength and durability. The steel lamination enhances the lock’s resistance to cutting and sawing, ensuring that it can withstand physical attacks and provide long-lasting security.

Supplied with 3 Keys: The padlock comes with three keys, providing you with multiple access options and ensuring that you always have a spare key available. The keys are designed for smooth operation and precise fit, making it easy to unlock and secure the padlock.

Durable and Rust-Resistant: Designed for longevity, the Dekton padlock features a durable construction that resists rust and corrosion. The rust-resistant finish ensures that the padlock maintains its performance and appearance over time, even when exposed to harsh environmental conditions.
description: From the manufacturer 50MM CLOSED SHACKLE HIGH SECURITY PADLOCK Closed shackle steel padlock. Aluminium body with plastic coating. Removable, double-locking shackle. Brass cylinder locking mechanism. Anti drill, anti pick key cylinder. Suitable for securing residential/commercial property, factories, garages and motorcycles. Hardened steel shackle. Includes 4 security keys. ADVANCED LEVEL OF SECURITY HARDENED STEEL CLOSED SHACKLE Removable, double-locking shackle. Designed to withstand attack from bolt cutters. Excellent anti-cut resistance. Heat treated to be harder, safer and cut resistant. KEY COVER PLATE Key cover plate. Brass cylinder locking mechanism. Protects against rust. SECURITY KEYS Supplied with 4 security keys for an added level of security against attack. IDEAL FOR SECURING Residential / Commercial property. Factories / Garages. Sheds / Fences. Doors/ Gates.
